row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a city street with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Pedestrians crossing left to right; vehicles parked or moving slowly in adjacent lanes.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during daytime with clear visibility. Multiple lanes, crosswalks, sidewalks, buildings, trees, and traffic infrastructure are present.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements clearly visible with no significant occlusion or distortion.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of ego vehicle; pedestrian movement is continuous and natural; vehicle positions change gradually over time.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain consistently visible unless occluded by perspective or distance; no sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and fixed structures maintain spatial consistency across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily through intersection while maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected; pedestrians are within designated crosswalk area; no abrupt maneuvers observed.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with reduced clarity in some areas. Buildings, roads, and vehicles are recognizable but exhibit artifacts.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some objects appear less sharp or partially merged; certain details like bicycle racks or signage may be ambiguous.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears consistent overall, but minor flickering or jittering occurs in object boundaries; pedestrian trajectories show slight instability.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though some exhibit ghosting or partial disappearance/reappearance due to generation artifacts.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains largely intact, but edge alignment between road and sidewalk occasionally drifts or warps slightly.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward at similar speed as reference, though path stability shows minor fluctuations.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may affect downstream decision-making; no overtly risky interactions visible, but ambiguity exists around pedestrian proximity and lane adherence.

missing_or_weakened_elements: distinct separation between curbs and sidewalks
fine detail on bicycles and small roadside objects
artifacts_or_instabilities: minor geometric warping in building edges
flicker in static textures (e.g., pavement patterns)
